title: Scoville Expert NEVERSTICK+ 30cm Deep Baking Tray, Non Stick Baking Tray for Oven, 30cm x 20cm, Perfect for Meats & Vegetables, Oven Safe to 260°C, Dishwasher Safe, PFOA Free, Aluminium, Grey
features: 30CM DEEP BAKING TRAY: The Scoville Expert Neverstick+ 30cm baking tray is an essential addition to any kitchen. Perfect for baking gooey brownies or roasting vegetables for a Sunday dinner, this deep oven tray handles it all. Crafted from thick-gauge aluminium, it offers excellent heat conduction and durability for long-lasting use.

SUPER STRONG NON-STICK: This small non-stick oven tray boasts Scoville's award-winning Neverstick+ technology, proven to be 6x stronger than other non-sticks. With such superior non-stick performance, you won't need to use any oil or butter when baking.
EASY-TO-CLEAN: Designed for everyday convenience, this tray is dishwasher safe for quick and easy cleaning. For the best and most enduring non-stick results, handwashing is recommended.
OVEN SAFE UP TO 260°C: Compatible with all standard household ovens and safe to use at temperatures up to 260°C.

LIFETIME GUARANTEE: SCOVILLE provides a lifetime guarantee on this product, covering any manufacturing defects or material issues during normal household use. To register your guarantee and access care instructions, please visit Scoville's website.
